case_title: LINDSAY D. TATEISHI VS. NOVA CORPORATION, WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TATEISHI, LINDSAY D.
